creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Hi tkato,

Unfortunately, we overlapped our efforts and both submitted patches for the same ports.

The patches that I submitted in PR199802 have been committed. I believe that means this bug report is no longer required. If so, can you please close this bug report? Or, if there are any additional improvements which are not in the current ports tree, can you please highlight them?

Thanks for your efforts!
